overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town at night. The character traverses narrow cobblestone streets and a bustling market square with half-timbered buildings and stone architecture, encountering various NPCs and guards.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street between half-timbered houses

events.description: character passes a seated NPC on a wooden bench to the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through a narrow cobblestone street, swords visible on his back

notable_agents.action: seated on wooden bench, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: traditional medieval half-timbered building with dark wooden beams
traditional medieval half-timbered building with stone foundation
tall stone tower visible in the distance against the night sky
simple wooden bench where an NPC is seated

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cobblestone street flanked by half-timbered medieval houses. Geralt walks forward through the dimly lit alley, passing a seated NPC on a wooden bench to the right. A distant stone tower looms ahead against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: market square entrance with red canopy stalls

events.description: exits narrow street into wider market area with merchant stalls
crowd density increases as character enters busy market square

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing forward through the market area, navigating between NPCs and stalls

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near a wooden cart, observing the area

entered.detail: wooden market stall with red and white striped canopy selling goods
large multi-story stone building with many windows, dominating the background
wooden merchant cart with wheels parked near the stall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the narrow street into a wider market square. Red-canopied merchant stalls appear on the right, and the crowd density increases significantly. A large stone building rises in the background while Geralt navigates through scattered pedestrians and passes an armored guard near a wooden cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: central market square with multiple vendor stalls

events.description: character turns slightly left to navigate around market stalls and NPCs
passing through dense market area with multiple vendor stalls on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt weaving through the market square, passing vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: vendor in green cap tending to a fruit stall, arranging produce

entered.detail: red brick building with tall narrow windows, distinct from the half-timbered architecture
circular stone well or fountain base in the center of the square
wooden stall displaying fruits and vegetables with vendor attending

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses the central market square, which opens up into a wide cobblestone plaza. A red brick building appears on the left, contrasting with the earlier half-timbered architecture. The character navigates around a central stone well and passes various market stalls including one with a vendor arranging produce. The crowd is moderately dense with people browsing goods.

scene_state.functional_zone: market exit leading to stone stairs and archway

events.description: exiting open market square toward enclosed stairway and archway
character begins ascending stone stairs toward the archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching and climbing stone stairs toward an archway, passing stationary guards

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at attention with polearm, watching the character approach

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading upward to an archway entrance
stone archway at the top of the stairs leading to another area
ornate iron shop sign hanging from a bracket on the building

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt exiting the market square and approaching a wide stone staircase leading to an archway. The crowd thins out as the character ascends the stairs. An armored guard stands at attention to the right, and an ornate iron shop sign hangs on the left. The scene ends as Geralt climbs toward the stone archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded medieval alleyway into a bustling market square and finally toward an elevated stone gateway. It begins on a narrow cobblestone street flanked by half-timbered houses, moving past a seated NPC toward a distant stone tower under a dark blue night sky. As the path widens, the scene opens into a crowded market square filled with red-canopied stalls and armored guards, where the architecture shifts from timber frames to large stone and red brick buildings. The camera then navigates through a wide plaza around a central stone well and various produce vendors before the crowd begins to thin. Finally, the movement leads Geralt away from the market and up a wide stone staircase, passing an ornate iron sign and a standing guard toward a looming stone archway.
